translation.en: I want to delete the old photo.

exampleSentences: Em có nên xóa bức ảnh này trên điện thoại không?
Anh lỡ gửi nhầm tin, em giúp anh xóa đi nhé.
Chị muốn xóa hết lịch sử cuộc gọi trước khi đưa máy cho em.
notes:
xóa = to delete or erase. You use it for removing text, files, photos, messages, or information.

It goes before the thing you remove: xóa + noun (xóa tin nhắn, xóa tên, xóa ứng dụng).  
You’ll also hear xóa đi (delete it / remove it) to make it sound more complete or decisive.  
For digital stuff, it’s the normal word; for pencil marks, tẩy is more specific (erase with an eraser).  
It can also mean “wipe out / eliminate” in abstract cases (xóa ký ức, xóa nợ), which feels stronger.
exampleSentencesTranslated: Should I delete this photo on my phone?
I accidentally sent the wrong message—could you help me delete it?
She wants to delete all call history before giving the phone to me.

translation.en: I need to delete this document.

definitions.vi: Loại bỏ hoặc xóa bỏ một cái gì đó.

example.en: I need to delete this photo.
example.vi: Tôi cần xóa bức ảnh này.

You’ll also hear **xóa đi** (delete it / remove it) to make it sound more complete or decisive.  
For digital stuff, it’s the normal word; for pencil marks, **tẩy** is more specific (erase with an eraser).  
It can also mean “wipe out / eliminate” in abstract cases (xóa ký ức, xóa nợ), which feels stronger.
